zh.lifeSummary: 當Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn於大約1344年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親Richard de Comyn Knight28歲，母親Lady Agnes Grant24歲。他於1375年與Janet Cameron在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1384年在蘇格蘭享年42歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn于大约1344年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲Richard de Comyn Knight28岁，母亲Lady Agnes Grant24岁。他于1375年与Janet Cameron在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1384年在苏格兰享年42岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Cumming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

variants.name: Cowman
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Cumming  .

variants.name: Coman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Vasile, Cornel, Mihaela, Nicolae, Sorin, Viorel.
Irish (Tipperary and Waterford): shortened form of Mac Cuimín or Ó Cuimín, see Cumming .

variants.name: Cummings
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Common
meanings: nickname from Middle English comen, Old English cuman ‘guest, stranger, newcomer’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn was born about 1344, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Richard de Comyn Knight, was 28 and his mother, Lady Agnes Grant, was 24. He married Janet Cameron in 1375, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1384, in Scotland, at the age of 42, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn est né environ 1344, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Richard de Comyn Knight, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Grant, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Janet Cameron en 1375, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1384, à Écosse, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.Altyre House, Morayshire, Scotland, Unit: Altyre House, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn um 1344 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Comyn Knight 28 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Grant 24. Er hat 1375 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland Janet Cameron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1384 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Janet Cameron nel 1375, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1384, nel Scotland, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comynが約1344年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard de Comyn Knightは28歳，母Lady Agnes Grantは24歳であった。1375年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでJanet Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1384年にスコットランドで42歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn(이)가 대략 1344년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Comyn Knight(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Grant(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1375년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 Janet Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1384년 스컷랜드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Janet Cameron em 1375, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1384, em Scotland, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn родился около 1344 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Richard de Comyn Knight было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Grant, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Cameron в 1375 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1384 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
